act: III — vMF vs softmax head: matched, head-only A/B
stack: 8-layer d=224, k_in=k_out=48, Muon+SparseMuon+AdamW, MTP, EMA, shortcut, unigram bias — identical for both heads
matched_config: Both runs: params=9,958,162, identical optimizer stack and training extras. v32_standard_softmax_comparison.py docstring: 'ONLY intentional differences vs v32_zipf_diagnostics.py: HEAD_MODE=linear'. The vMF side is scripts/v41_vmf_concentrated.py --sota (interleaved FFFFFFFF, rw=0).
headline: At matched epoch 2 and matched 9.96M params, swapping linear softmax for a vMF (row-normalized) head improves val PPL 57.05 -> 52.82 (-7.4%) and tail_30K+ CE 10.42 -> 8.94. By ep4 vMF reaches val 46.84 / test 46.16.

softmax_baseline.head: linear (standard softmax), HEAD_MODE='linear'
softmax_baseline.tail_note: ep1 tail CE 11.38 is ABOVE uniform (10.83): softmax actively damages tail tokens early in training

vmf_matched_epoch.head: vMF (row-normalized A_out, score = z · a_v/||a_v||), HEAD_MODE='vmf'
vmf_matched_epoch.source: scripts/v41_vmf_concentrated.py; full epoch logs preserved in internal run transcript (AGG val lines: 61.76 / 52.82 / 49.21 / 46.84; test 46.16)

vmf_long_run.head: vMF, original v32 main run (v32_zipf_full_diagnostics)
vmf_long_run.epoch1_2: NOT LOGGED in repo — only Drive checkpoints exist (v32_zipf_full_diagnostics_ep{1,2}.pt); ep3 notebook resumes from ep2 without optimizer state

convergence_verdict.claim: vMF-head models converge faster than identical softmax models
evidence: ep2 val: vMF 52.82 vs softmax 57.05 (-7.4%) at identical params/optimizer/data (v41 vs 06)
ep1 val: vMF 61.76 vs softmax 67.11 — vMF ahead from the first epoch
tail_30K+ CE: vMF below uniform from ep1 (9.54); softmax above uniform at ep1 (11.38 > 10.83)
mechanism: head/body gradient ratio 3.78x (softmax, head hoards gradient) vs 1.31x (vMF) — body receives signal from epoch 1
corrected_claims: findings_summary.md 'vMF ~42 at ep2' is a MISLABEL — 42.72 is vMF ep8 val. The honest ep2 gap is ~4.2 val PPL (-7.4%), not 26%.
findings_summary.md 'softmax AdamW' label is wrong for the 8L pair — the softmax baseline uses the same Muon+SparseMuon+AdamW stack (verified in script).
v32 main vMF run's own ep1-2 are unlogged; the matched-epoch claim rests on the v41 run, which uses the identical v32 stack/architecture.
convergence_verdict.interpretation: vMF acts as a preconditioner: it removes the radial scoring term so the head cannot hoard gradient, the body learns earlier, and |A_out| is freed to encode pure frequency (Pearson 0.95 vs ~0.7 for softmax). Later analysis suggests the asymptotic floor is body-determined, not head-determined — head changes the path to the floor, not the floor.

H8_one_over_t_floor.note: check units vs findings doc (~0.67); likely label bug

honest_summary: Head-only matched A/B confirms vMF converges faster (-7.4% val PPL at ep2, tail rescued from ep1) and reaches val 42.72 / test 39.20 by ep8. H1 main Zipf-angle claim did NOT pass gate; H4 radial structure confirmed at 0.96.
